evals.prompt: I want to create a simple NFT on Sui. It should have a name and a description, and anyone should be able to transfer it. Write the Move module for me.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Struct has key and store abilities (store needed for public transfer)
Struct has id: UID as first field
Uses Move 2024 edition syntax (module declaration with semicolon)
Includes a constructor function that takes &mut TxContext

evals.prompt: How do I create a new fungible token on Sui? Write me a complete module with minting capability.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Uses One-Time Witness pattern (struct named after module in ALL CAPS with drop ability)
Calls coin::create_currency in the init function
Handles TreasuryCap and CoinMetadata correctly
Includes a mint function that uses the TreasuryCap

evals.prompt: I'm building a name registry on Sui where users can claim names. I want to emit events when names are registered. Write the Move code.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Event struct has copy and drop abilities
Uses sui::event::emit to emit events
Registry is a shared object
Uses a collection type (Table, VecMap, etc.) for name storage

evals.prompt: Write a Move module for an event ticket that can be used exactly once. After use, the ticket should be destroyed. The ticket should not be transferable by the holder.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
Ticket struct has key but NOT store (non-transferable by holder)
Includes a function that destroys the ticket by unpacking and calling id.delete()
Uses Move 2024 edition syntax

evals.prompt: Build me a shared counter on Sui with increment and read functions. Include unit tests.
expectations: Code compiles with sui move build
All tests pass with sui move test
Counter is shared via transfer::share_object
Test module uses sui::test_scenario or #[test] functions
At least one test verifies incrementing works correctly
